r.t:
Product Name
Customer-facing name of the product.
Example: Celeste Diamond Ring

SKU
Unique product code used to match images and avoid duplicates.
Example: HDR-1001

Lane
Decides whether the product belongs to the standard, hiphop, or collection flow.
Example: standard

Category
Main category name exactly as it exists in the catalog.
Example: Rings

Subcategory
Subcategory name when the selected category uses one.
Example: Engagement Rings

Option
Option name when the selected subcategory uses one.
Example: Solitaire

Style
Style name from the catalog setup.
Example: Classic

Description
Main product description shown on the storefront.
Example: Elegant solitaire ring crafted for everyday luxury.

Stock Quantity
Available stock count. Use 0 if unavailable.
Example: 5

Discount Price
Optional discounted selling price.
Example: 54999

GST Slab
GST slab name exactly as configured in the catalog.
Example: GST 3%

Metal 1
Primary metal selection from the catalog master table.
Example: 14K Yellow Gold

Metal 2
Optional second metal selection.
Example: Platinum

Metal 3
Optional third metal selection.
Example:

Certificate 1
Primary certificate selection from the catalog master table.
Example: IGI

Certificate 2
Optional second certificate selection.
Example: GIA

Material Value 1
Primary material selector value from the catalog master table.
Example: Glossy Finish

Material Value 2
Optional second material selector value.
Example: Comfort Fit

Material Value 3
Optional third material selector value.
Example:

Material Value 4
Optional fourth material selector value.
Example:

Purity 1 Label
First purity label. The importer will use purity rows to build pricing.
Example: 18K

Purity 1 Price
Price for the first purity row.
Example: 59999

Purity 2 Label
Optional second purity label.
Example: 22K

Purity 2 Price
Optional price for the second purity row.
Example: 64999

Purity 3 Label
Optional third purity label.
Example: Pt 950

Purity 3 Price
Optional price for the third purity row.
Example: 68999

Image 1
Main image filename only, not a full path.
Example: HDR-1001_main.jpg

Image 2
Second image filename if available.
Example: HDR-1001_side.jpg

Image 3
Third image filename if available.
Example: HDR-1001_top.jpg

Image 4
Fourth image filename if available.
Example: HDR-1001_detail.jpg

Video
Optional product video filename only.
Example: HDR-1001_video.mp4

Specification 1 Key
Optional product specification label.
Example: Occasion

Specification 1 Value
Optional product specification value.
Example: Bridal

Specification 2 Key
Optional second product specification label.
Example: Setting

Specification 2 Value
Optional second product specification value.
Example: Prong

Specification 3 Key
Optional third product specification label.
Example: Finish

Specification 3 Value
Optional third product specification value.
Example: High Polish

Specification 4 Key
Optional fourth product specification label.
Example:

Specification 4 Value
Optional fourth product specification value.
Example:

Engraving Label
Leave blank if engraving is not needed.
Example: Complimentary Engraving
